age_range.evidence: Two age groups were targeted: adolescents aged 15–16 years and young adults aged 20–24 years.

countries.evidence: This longitudinal study in three capital cities of South America, focusing on youth from vulnerable urban areas... Bogotá (Colombia), Buenos Aires (Argentina), and Lima (Peru)

fieldwork_year.evidence: Participants were recruited between April 2021 and November 2022

sample_size.evidence: A longitudinal study assessed 1280 participants with depression and/or anxiety at baseline.
